Blindsight.entries.0: If you have Blindsight, you can see within a specific range without relying on physical sight. Within that range, you can see anything that isn't behind {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} even if you have the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition or are in {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}. Moreover, in that range, you can see something that has the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition.
Blindsight.name: Blindsight
Darkvision.entries.0: If you have Darkvision, you can see in {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} within a specified range as if it were {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB} and in {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB} within that range as if it were {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB}. You discern colors in that {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB} only as shades of gray.
Darkvision.name: Darkvision
Tremorsense.entries.0: A creature with Tremorsense can pinpoint the location of creatures and moving objects within a specific range, provided that the creature with Tremorsense and anything it is detecting are both in contact with the same surface (such as the ground, a wall, or a ceiling) or the same liquid.
Tremorsense.entries.1: Tremorsense can't detect creatures or objects in the air, and it doesn't count as a form of sight.
Tremorsense.name: Tremorsense
Truesight.entries.0: If you have Truesight, your vision is enhanced within a specified range. Within that range, your vision pierces through the following:
Truesight.entries.1.items.0.entries.0: You can see in normal and magical {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}.
Truesight.entries.1.items.0.name: Darkness
Truesight.entries.1.items.1.entries.0: You see creatures and objects that have the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition.
Truesight.entries.1.items.1.name: Invisibility
Truesight.entries.1.items.2.entries.0: Visual illusions appear transparent to you, and you automatically succeed on {@variantrule Saving Throw|XPHB|saving throws} against them.
Truesight.entries.1.items.2.name: Visual Illusions
Truesight.entries.1.items.3.entries.0: You discern the true form of any creature or object you see that has been transformed by magic.
Truesight.entries.1.items.3.name: Transformations
Truesight.entries.1.items.4.entries.0: You see into the Ethereal Plane.
Truesight.entries.1.items.4.name: Ethereal Plane
Truesight.name: Truesight
